name: Marmalade Cake (Scottish)
recipeIngredient: 1 tsp Finely grated rind of an orange
recipeInstructions:
1. Set oven to 350°F or Mark 4.
2. Grease a 6-inch round cake tin.
3. Sift the self-raising flour and salt into a bowl.
4. Rub in the margarine until the mixture resembles fine breadcrumbs.
5. Stir in the sugar and half the orange rind, then add the eggs, marmalade, milk, and vanilla essence.
6. Mix well to form a thick batter.
7. Pour into the prepared tin and bake in the centre of the oven for approximately 1 hour 20 minutes, or until golden in colour and a skewer inserted into the cake comes out clean.
8. Sprinkle the remaining orange rind over the top.
9. Leave in the tin for a few minutes before turning out onto a wire rack to cool.
